# dokploy_traefik_config (Resource)

Manages Dokploy global Traefik configuration via settings.read/update/reloadTraefikConfig endpoints.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config` (String) Full Traefik configuration content to persist in Dokploy settings.

### Optional

- `reload_on_apply` (Boolean) If true, triggers settings.reloadTraefik after create/update.
- `scope` (String) Traefik settings scope. Supported values: main, web_server, middleware.
- `server_id` (String) Optional Dokploy server ID for multi-server deployments.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
